channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: openai/codex-plugin-cc
item.description: 待翻译：Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

item.title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
item.description: 待翻译：🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

item.title: alibaba/page-agent
item.description: 待翻译：JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

item.title: usestrix/strix
item.description: 待翻译：Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

item.title: ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp
item.description: 待翻译：Chrome DevTools for coding agents

item.title: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
item.description: 待翻译：Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

item.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
item.description: 待翻译：Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

item.title: harvard-edge/cs249r_book
item.description: 待翻译：Machine Learning Systems

item.title: rommapp/romm
item.description: 待翻译：A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.

item.title: ogulcancelik/herdr
item.description: 待翻译：agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

item.title: dotnet/skills
item.description: 待翻译：Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

item.title: agentskills/agentskills
item.description: 待翻译：Specification and documentation for Agent Skills

item.title: immich-app/immich
item.description: 待翻译：High performance self-hosted photo and video management solution.

item.title: chthollyphile/folia-major
item.description: 待翻译：专注于绚丽的歌词动画效果的本地音乐/navidrome/第三方网易云播放器

item.title: mattpocock/skills
item.description: 待翻译：Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
item.description: 待翻译：Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

item.title: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
item.description: 待翻译：337 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.
item.category: 开发框架, AI代理, skills, 开发者工具, 编辑器插件

item.title: crynta/terax-ai
item.description: 待翻译：Lightweight (7MB) Terminal-first AI-native dev workspace
